blended.narrative: Mt. Spokane is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,400 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.1" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Thursday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
